Attention thins, emotions accelerate, adults prove no more resilient than teenagers, autonomy erodes in micro-increments, and identity becomes whatever narrative the algorithm reflects back. All victims were bus passengers and the lorry driver is in custody.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/turkey-road-accident-7-killed-multiple-injured-after-intercity-bus-crashes-into-lorry-driver-detained/articleshow/125803617.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/turkey-road-accident-7-killed-multiple-injured-after-intercity-bus-crashes-into-lorry-driver-detained/articleshow/125803617.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Dec 2025 15:53:24 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1743724" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125803653,imgsize-1743724.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Shubman Gill cleared to play T20I series vs South Africa]]></title><description><![CDATA[Shubman Gill had been included in the T20I squad subject to fitness and was required to undergo a full set of rehabilitation and skill-based Return To Play (RTP) protocols.  Gill's injury occurred due to a whiplash incident on the second day of the Kolkata Test, resulting in Gill being hospitalised for a couple of days and administered an injection.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-south-africa/shubman-gill-cleared-for-t20is-vs-south-africa-after-passing-fitness-tests-at-coe/articleshow/125802882.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-south-africa/shubman-gill-cleared-for-t20is-vs-south-africa-after-passing-fitness-tests-at-coe/articleshow/125802882.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Dec 2025 14:37:02 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="30396" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125802888,imgsize-30396.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[‘Any dish for Rs 30’: Bengaluru pub’s offer leads to chaos, traffic jam in city]]></title><description><![CDATA[A 'dish for Rs 30' anniversary offer at a Bengaluru pub backfired, drawing a thousand-strong crowd far exceeding its 300-person capacity. Chaos ensued, leading to traffic jams and the pub's early closure. Police intervened to disperse the frustrated, hungry patrons who had waited for hours, some arriving after the offer had ended.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bengaluru/bengaluru-pubs-any-dish-for-rs-30-offer-leads-to-chaos-traffic-jam/articleshow/125794003.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/bengaluru/bengaluru-pubs-any-dish-for-rs-30-offer-leads-to-chaos-traffic-jam/articleshow/125794003.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Dec 2025 06:52:17 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="74896" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125798511,imgsize-74896.cms"/></item></channel></rss>
